THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAJAC, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, GARY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00, PLAINTIFF RICHARD MANFREDONIA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH A CLAIM FOR DAMAGES BY THAT PLAINTIFF.
